name: pied-piper
description: Gives Claude a free team of workers on Arbisoft's LiteLLM — including a browser. One-command setup turns pi.dev into a delegation backend that inherits your Claude Code MCP servers + skills, then exposes interactive multi-turn workers (explore, debug, trace, exec, review, security, qa, playwright) Claude drives turn-by-turn. Grunt work (repo search, diff review, browser automation, refactors) runs on free models; only distilled findings re-enter Claude's context. Lighter, interactive successor to delegate.
